details.description: Detailed error message or object from BRLA API or server.

inputAmount.description: The amount of currency to be input.

inputCurrency.description: The currency type for the input amount.

networks.description: Optional whitelist of networks to evaluate when searching for the best quote. If omitted or empty, all eligible networks for the corridor are considered.

outputCurrency.description: The desired currency type for the output amount.

birthdate.description: Date must be in format YYYY-MMM-DD.

quoteId.description: Optional. The quote that triggered onboarding. Omit it for the quote-less KYB deep link (`?kyb` / `?kybLocked` widget entry), where business verification starts before any quote exists. Stored only as onboarding provenance; it is not an authorization input.

subaccountId.description: The ID of the created or processed subaccount.

DestinationType.description: Represents either a blockchain network or a traditional payment method.

code.description: HTTP status code returned by the API error handler.

errors.description: Validation error details, when the request fails schema or input validation.

statusCode.description: HTTP status code included by selected provider-style error responses.

externalTxExplorerLink.description: A link to the transaction explorer of the blockchain showing the details of the transaction sending the tokens to the user's wallet address. Only available for 'BUY' ramps.

externalTxHash.description: The hash of the blockchain transaction sending the tokens to the user's wallet address. Only available for 'BUY' ramps.

remainingLimitOfframp.description: The remaining limit for offramp operations.

remainingLimitOnramp.description: The remaining limit for onramp operations.

callbackUrl.description: The widget will redirect to this callbackUrl after the user successfully created the transaction.

externalSessionId.description: A unique identifier for yourself to keep track of the widget session. Returned in the responses of webhooks, if registered.

quoteId.description: Pass the ID of an existing quote to make the widget lock in that particular quote without allowing to change it.

walletAddressLocked.description: Pass this parameter if you want to lock the wallet address for the user. It will not be editable in the widget.

apiKey.description: Your api key, if available. This is passed to all the quotes generated in this widget session.

callbackUrl.description: The widget will redirect to this callbackUrl after the user successfully created the transaction.

externalSessionId.description: A unique identifier for yourself to keep track of the widget session. Returned in the responses of webhooks, if registered.

walletAddressLocked.description: Pass this parameter if you want to lock the wallet address for the user. It will not be editable in the widget.

PaymentData.description: Data related to the payment for the ramp transaction.

anchorTargetAccount.description: The target account for an anchor operation.

PresignedTx.description: Represents a transaction that has been presigned. Based on UnsignedTx structure.

meta.description: Any additional metadata associated with the transaction. Can be an empty object.

nonce.description: Nonce for the transaction, if applicable.

phase.description: The phase this transaction belongs to within the ramp logic.

signer.description: Address of the account that signed/will sign this transaction.

txData.description: The presigned transaction payload or relevant data.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when this quote expires.

inputAmount.description: The input amount specified in the request.

outputAmount.description: The calculated output amount after fees and conversions.

RampCurrency.description: Represents supported currencies for ramp operations, including fiat and on-chain tokens.

RampPhase.description: The current phase of the ramp process.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the ramp process was created.

depositQrCode.description: BR Code for PIX payment, if applicable.

from.description: The source network or payment method.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ramp process.

quoteId.description: The quote ID associated with this ramp process.

sessionId.description: The `externalSessionId` is an optional URL parameter that integrators can provide to track ramp transactions within their own systems. This identifier allows you to correlate Vortex transactions with your internal session or transaction tracking. `externalSessionId` url param is named `sessionId` in the Vortex API.

to.description: The destination network or payment method.

unsignedTxs.description: Array of unsigned transactions that need to be signed by the user.

walletAddress.description: The address of the source account for SELL, or the address the destination account for BUY transactions.

additionalData.description:
Optional additional data for the ramp process.

For Stellar offramps, paymentData is required.

For Brazil onramps, destinationAddress and taxId  arerequired.

For Brazil offramps, pixDestination, taxId and receiverTaxId are required.

moneriumAuthToken.description: Auth token obtained from Monerium's API, for the current user. Only required for Monerium-related ramps.

pixDestination.description: PIX key for the destination account in an onramp.

receiverTaxId.description: Tax ID of the receiver for onramp.

quoteId.description: The unique identifier for the quote.

signingAccounts.description:
Array of accounts that will be used for signing transactions.

For Stellar offramps, Stellar and Pendulum ephemerals are required.
For Brazil on/off ramps, Moonbeam and Pendulum ephemerals are required.

receiverTaxId.description: The recipient's Tax ID for validation.

offrampId.description: The ID of the triggered offramp transaction.

UnsignedTx.description: Represents an unsigned transaction that requires user signature. Actual properties will depend on the transaction type and network.

txData.description: The unsigned transaction payload or relevant data.

additionalData.description: Optional additional data, like transaction hashes from external services.

assetHubToPendulumHash.description: Transaction hash for AssetHub to Pendulum transfer, if applicable.

moneriumOfframpSignature.description: Signed message to trigger a Monerium offramp.

squidRouterApproveHash.description: Transaction hash for Squid Router approval, if applicable.

squidRouterSwapHash.description: Transaction hash for Squid Router swap, if applicable.

presignedTxs.description: An array of transactions that have been pre-signed by the user.

rampId.description: The unique identifier of the ramp process to start.

valid.description: Indicates if the PIX key is valid.

info.description:
Cross-border payments gateway built on the Pendulum blockchain.

**Scope:** 25 paths verified against `apps/api/src/api/routes/v1/`.

**Auth principals:**
- `X-API-Key: sk_<live|test>_...` — partner SDK key (server-side).
- `X-Public-Key: pk_<live|test>_...` — partner public key (browser; attribution only).
- `Authorization: Bearer <Supabase JWT>` — first-party user session.

All `/v1/brla/*` endpoints accept Supabase Bearer only; partner sk_*/pk_* keys are not accepted on BRLA routes.

**Webhook signing:** RSA-PSS 2048 / SHA-256. Fetch the signing key from `GET /v1/public-key`.
info.title: Vortex API

post.description:
`companyName`, `startDate` and `cnpj` are only required when taxIdType is `CNPJ`

`quoteId` is optional: pass it in the normal ramp flow, or omit it for the quote-less KYB deep link where business verification starts before any quote exists.

**Auth:** uses `optionalAuth` — accepts a Supabase Bearer token if present but does not require one.

200.description: Subaccount created or KYC retry initiated successfully.

400.description:
Bad Request. Possible reasons:
- Missing required fields (cpf, cnpj, companyName, startDate)
- Subaccount already created and KYC level > 0
- Other invalid request details
Missing taxId or subaccount not found (returned as 400 from code).

500.description: Internal Server Error (e.g., no KYC events found when expected).

get.description:
Returns the Avenia selfie/liveness-check URL for the subaccount associated with this tax ID.

**Auth:** requires `Authorization: Bearer <Supabase JWT>`.

post.description:
Returns presigned upload URLs for the user's ID document and selfie. Only `ID` and `DRIVERS-LICENSE` are accepted for `documentType` (passport not supported here).

**Auth:** uses `optionalAuth` — accepts a Supabase Bearer token if present but does not require one.

400.description: Missing/invalid documentType or taxId; or ramp disabled for this tax ID.

get.description:
Fetches a user's subaccount information. The response contains only the EVM wallet address and KYC level.

**Auth:** requires `Authorization: Bearer <Supabase JWT>`.

400.description:
Bad Request. Possible reasons:
- Missing taxId query parameter
- KYC invalid
Missing taxId query parameter or other invalid request.

404.description: Subaccount not found or limits not found.

post.description:
Submits the user's KYC level 1 payload to Avenia after documents have been uploaded via `/v1/brla/getUploadUrls`. Includes a built-in 5-second delay to allow upstream document propagation.

**Auth:** uses `optionalAuth`.

get.description:
Checks whether a Pix key exists and is valid. The key value itself is intentionally not echoed back in the response for security.

**Auth:** requires `Authorization: Bearer <Supabase JWT>`.

parameters.description: Pix key to validate (CPF, CNPJ, email, phone, or random key).
parameters.name: pixKey

get.description: Returns the RSA-PSS 2048 / SHA-256 public key used to verify Vortex webhook signatures. This is NOT a partner `pk_*` API key.

publicKey.description: RSA-PSS 2048-bit public key in PEM format. Use this key to verify webhook signatures with RSA-PSS / SHA-256.

200.description: RSA-PSS public key in PEM format.

post.description: Generates a quote for a specified ramp transaction, detailing input and output amounts, fees, and expiration.

Bad Request. Possible reasons:
- Missing required fields (rampType, from, to, inputAmount, inputCurrency, outputCurrency)
- Invalid ramp type (must be "BUY" or "SELL")

value.message: This route is temporarily unavailable due to low liquidity. Please try a smaller amount or check back soon.

500.description: Internal Server Error. Low-liquidity route failures use this status with a safe user-facing message; unexpected internal failures remain masked.

get.description:
Get a quote by ID.

**Auth:** none. This endpoint is fully public; anyone with the quote ID can read it.

post.description: Generates a new quote for the network that yields the highest output amount for the given parameters. This endpoint compares the output for a given input amount over all supported networks and returns the 'best' quote, defined as the one with the highest output.

post.description:
Starts a ramp process. 

It is assumed all required information from the client has already been sent using the `update` endpoint. This endpoint is only used to tell the backend any external operation (like a bank transfer) has been completed, and the ramp can start.

post.description:
Submits presigned transactions and additional data to an existing ramp process before starting it. 
This endpoint can be called many times, and data can be incrementally added to the ramp. 

Note: For both pre-signed transactions and the generic `additionalData` object, existing properties will be overriden by new values.

### Required data for ramps.
The signed counterpart of the initial unsignedTxs object must be provided for all ramps, as required by the object.
For offramps, the `additionalData` field must contain the confirmation hash corresponding to the inital transaction in which the user sends the funds.  
If the originating chain is `Assethub`, then `assetHubToPendulumHash` must be provided. 
If the originating chain is any `EVM` chain, then `squidRouterApproveHash` and  `squidRouterSwapHash` must be provided. 

For onramps, no additional data is required after registering the ramp.

This identifier allows you to correlate Vortex transactions with your internal session or transaction tracking. `externalSessionId` url param is named `sessionId` in the Vortex API.

- Invalid additional data format (if provided, must be an object)

post.description:
Creates a hosted Vortex Widget session and returns the URL to open for the user.

This single endpoint supports two mutually exclusive request shapes:

- **Fixed quote** (`GetWidgetUrlLocked`) — pass a `quoteId` you created via `POST /v1/quotes`. The widget uses that exact quote and does not refresh it. If the quote expires before the user finishes, they must close the window and start over.

- **Auto-refresh** (`GetWidgetUrlRefresh`) — pass the route parameters (`network`, `rampType`, `inputAmount`, plus `fiat` / `cryptoLocked` / `paymentMethod` as relevant for the direction). The widget creates and refreshes quotes on demand for the user.

Use the example switcher below to see the request shape for each mode. `externalSessionId` is required in both modes and is echoed back in webhook payloads.

autoRefresh.description: Pass the route definition. The widget creates and refreshes quotes on demand for the user.

fixedQuote.description: Pass an existing `quoteId`. The widget locks in that quote and does not refresh it.

url.description: The widget URL to open for the user.

200.description: Returned when a fixed-quote session was created.

url.description: The widget URL to open for the user.

201.description: Returned when an auto-refresh session was created.

400.description: Missing required fields, or `quoteId` not provided for fixed-quote mode and route fields not provided for auto-refresh mode.

404.description: Quote not found or expired (fixed-quote mode only).

parameters.description: e.g. "BRL". All the supported currencies you can get from `supported-fiat-currencies` endpoint.
parameters.name: fiatCurrency

supportedCurrencies.description: All the supported currencies you can get from `supported-fiat-currencies` endpoint.

name.description: Unique name of the payment method: `SEPA`, `PIX`, `CBU`

supportedFiats.description: Array of supported fiat currencies by payment method.

items.description: Supported fiat currency for a given payment method

post.description:
Register a new webhook to receive event notifications.

**Auth:** requires `X-API-Key: sk_*`. Supabase Bearer is NOT accepted on webhook endpoints.

items.description: (optional): Array of event types to subscribe to. Defaults to all events if not specified. ["TRANSACTION_CREATED", "STATUS_CHANGE"]

quoteId.description: (required* one of two: quoteId or sessionId): Subscribe to events for a specific quote

sessionId.description: (required* one of two: quoteId or sessionId): Subscribe to events for a specific session

createdAt.description: The creation date of the webhook

events.description: The events the webhook is subscribed for

quoteId.description: (optional): The specific transactionId that the events are subscribed for

sessionId.description: (optional): The specific sessionId that the events are subscribed for

delete.description:
Remove a webhook subscription.

**Auth:** requires `X-API-Key: sk_*`. Supabase Bearer is NOT accepted on webhook endpoints.
